---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a public-safe SendLens OSS feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What SendLens user workflow is missing or weak?

## Proposed behavior

What should SendLens do?

## Workflow

- [ ] setup
- [ ] workspace health
- [ ] campaign performance
- [ ] launch QA
- [ ] copy analysis
- [ ] reply patterns
- [ ] ICP signals
- [ ] experiment planning
- [ ] AM brief
- [ ] MCP tool/runtime
- [ ] docs

## Evidence and privacy impact

Does this affect exact, sampled, reconstructed, hydrated reply, or client-safe wording behavior?

## Ownership check

- [ ] This belongs in SendLens.
- [ ] This is not host portability, generated packaging, install, or cross-agent behavior owned by Pluxx.
